title: AntiRaidFarm
description: Configure a cooldown on raids to break farms that abuse infinite bad omen loops
body:
# AntiRaidFarm

Block cheaty raid farms which exploit infinite bad omen loops with this simple plugin. There are no commands for this plugin. Players who you want to bypass the cooldown can be given the "antiraidfarm.bypass" permission.

An example of a farm broken by this plugin (works on all raid farms):
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2gcWlWTuTj8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Config
config.yml:
```yaml
# How many seconds must a player wait between starting raids
# Give the permission `antiraidfarm.bypass` to players you wish to bypass this
raid-cooldown-seconds: 180
```
